description:
A choropleth map illustrating the geographic extent and Production Unit (PU) outlines for the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CLCplus Backbone production across Europe, parts of North Africa, and Western Asia. The main map displays a continuous colour gradient across landmasses, transitioning from dark blue and purple tones in northern regions (e.g., Iceland, northern Scandinavia) through various shades of purple and green in central Europe, to yellow and orange in southern and eastern areas (e.g., Mediterranean basin, North Africa, Turkey). The specific environmental parameter represented by this colour gradient is not indicated by a legend.

The map includes black "PU outlines" which delineate numerous distinct production areas across the mapped territory. Two inset maps are provided: one for the Azores Islands and another for the Canary and Madeira Islands, both displaying their respective PU outlines. The main map includes a scale bar indicating 0, 250, 500, and 1,000 km. The inset maps each have a scale bar showing 0, 150, and 300 km. The surrounding text indicates this map is part of the "General workflow of the CLCplus Backbone 2023 production" which primarily uses Sentinel-2 (S-2) time-series data as input.
